# Millecube Digital — AI Discovery File
# https://millecube.com
# Last updated: 2026-06-21

Millecube Digital is a technical-first digital marketing agency based in Penang, Malaysia.
Legal entity: Cadoo Venture Sdn. Bhd.

We specialise in paid media, marketplace management, and measurable digital marketing for
Malaysian SMEs and growing brands. All work is tracked to revenue, not just impressions.

## Services

- Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram): full-funnel campaign strategy, creative, and reporting
- Google Ads: search, display, Performance Max, and Shopping campaigns
- Marketplace Management: Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop — listings, ads, and chat
- Social Media Marketing: organic strategy, content calendar, and community management
- SEO: technical SEO, on-page optimisation, and local search (Google Business Profile)
- Website & Landing Pages: Next.js, WordPress, and Webflow — built for conversion
- Content & Creative: ad creatives, copywriting, short-form video, and campaign concepts
- Branding & Strategy: brand positioning, identity design, and 90-day marketing strategy

## Who We Serve

Malaysian SMEs who are serious about measurable growth. Typical clients:
- Retail and e-commerce brands selling on Shopee and Lazada
- Service businesses using Meta Ads for lead generation
- Growing brands that want to understand where their ad spend is going

## Key Differentiators

- No lock-in contracts — clients stay because results work
- All conversions tracked to a specific action (lead, sale, WhatsApp click)
- Transparent reporting — clients see actual performance, not vanity metrics
- Server-side conversion tracking (Meta CAPI) to protect attribution accuracy

## Pricing Signals

- Paid media management: from RM2,000/mo
- Marketplace management: from RM2,000/mo per platform
- Website builds: project-based pricing
- Content production: monthly retainer or per-sprint

## Location

2-5-9, Gat Lebuh Macallum
10300 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

## Contact

Email: hello@millecube.com
WhatsApp: +60 16-496 3875
Web: https://millecube.com/contact

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does digital marketing cost in Malaysia?
A: Paid media management at Millecube starts from RM2,000 per month per channel.
   Ad spend is separate and budgeted based on client goals and platform minimums.

Q: Does Millecube work with small businesses?
A: Yes. We work with Malaysian SMEs at all growth stages, from early-stage brands
   to established businesses scaling their digital presence.

Q: What platforms does Millecube manage?
A: Meta (Facebook + Instagram), Google Ads, Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop.
   We also build websites and manage SEO for clients who need a full-stack approach.

Q: How long does it take to see results from Meta Ads?
A: Most clients see meaningful data within 30 days and peak performance within 90 days
   as the algorithm learns from real conversion signals.

Q: Does Millecube require a long-term contract?
A: No. There is no lock-in contract. Clients are retained month-to-month.
